title: orchis spitzelii var. atlantica
intro: Orchis spitzelii var. atlantica, a variety of the Orchis spitzelii plant, is a type of terrestrial orchid that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Orchis spitzelii var. atlantica include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
